prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距宁夏较远，属跨省招生；2025 年宁夏物理类计划 31 人占该校在宁夏总计划的比重较高，2026 年缩招后占比下降，但该校在宁夏的招生规模仍属中等水平，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的波动背景、2026 年招生计划大幅缩减（-58%）带来的竞争缓解效应、学校排名持续上升及抖音热度偏正面等因素，预计 2026 年录取位次将较 2025 年明显前移（数字减小）。但学校声誉提升和考生规模持平会在一定程度上抵消缩招带来的位次前移幅度。预测最低位次约 2052 名，区间 1744–2360 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 3060 → 2074 → 1717 → 3072, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, and then significantly dropping. From 2022 to 2024, rankings continuously moved forward (from 3060 to 1717), but in 2025, due to the exam mode changing from science to physics category and adjustments in subject selection requirements, the ranking sharply dropped to 3072, moving back by about 1355 places compared to 2024, indicating high volatility. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3072. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for science/physics category was 26 students from 2022 to 2024, increasing to 31 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category plan significantly reduces to 13 students, a decrease of 18 students (about 58%) compared to 2025. This substantial reduction in enrollment theoretically lowers competition intensity, causing the admission ranking to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Engineering University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities has been steadily rising: 50th in 2021 → 53rd in 2022 → 49th in 2023 → 45th in 2024 → 43rd in 2025 → 43rd in 2026, consistently ranking among the top 50 nationally in recent years, indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition. The university's popularity rating on Douyin (TikTok) is 'relatively hot', ranking 27th overall with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.717 million. Main video content revolves around characteristic tags such as 'Seven Sons of National Defense' and 'Three Seas and One Nuclear', with mostly positive exposure. The university's reputation documents show no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal admission records, and the overall application psychological environment is stable and relatively positive. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A-level, the only discipline rated A- or above. Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Nuclear Science and Technology, etc., are traditional flagship fields, highly related to the enrollment majors such as Ocean Engineering, Nuclear Chemistry and Nuclear Fuel Engineering, and Automation, strongly attracting relevant major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Ningxia, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. In 2025, the 31 physics category slots in Ningxia accounted for a relatively high proportion of the university's total enrollment in Ningxia. After the 2026 enrollment reduction, this proportion decreases, but the university's enrollment scale in Ningxia remains at a medium level, and geographical preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking drop in 2025, the competition relief effect from the substantial enrollment reduction in 2026 (-58%), the continuous rise in university ranking, and the relatively positive Douyin popularity, it is expected that the admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward (numerically smaller) compared to 2025. However, the improvement in university reputation and the stable number of examinees will to some extent offset the ranking forward movement caused by the enrollment reduction. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2052, with a range of 1744–2360.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (1744–2360), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors (Xinghai Leading Class, Qian Xuesen Class) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., close to 1744), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is near the upper bound (around 2360), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as safety, and cautiously reach for Tier 1.
